summary: Passionate and experienced Senior Frontend Engineer with 7+ years building scalable, performant web applications. Specializing in React ecosystems, TypeScript, and modern CSS. Proven track record of leading cross-functional teams, mentoring junior engineers, and shipping high-quality products that delight users.

bullets: Led the redesign of the core product dashboard, reducing load time by 40% through code splitting, lazy loading, and memoization strategies
Architected a reusable design system with 50+ components using React, TypeScript, and Storybook, adopted by 5 product teams
Mentored 3 junior engineers through weekly 1:1s, code reviews, and pairing sessions, accelerating their onboarding by 30%
Collaborated with design and product teams to ship 12 feature releases on schedule across 2 major product lines
Built and maintained React-based SPAs for 8 client projects, ensuring cross-browser compatibility and WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility
Integrated RESTful and GraphQL APIs, implementing optimistic UI updates and real-time data sync via WebSockets
Reduced bundle size by 35% through tree-shaking, dynamic imports, and dependency auditing
Developed responsive landing pages and marketing sites using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React
Contributed to an internal CMS tool that reduced content update time from 2 hours to 15 minutes for non-technical staff

projects.name: AI Resume Builder
bullets: Built a JSON-driven resume builder with multiple visual templates and one-click PDF export
Supports theme switching, custom JSON upload, and print-optimized layouts

projects.name: OpenMetrics Dashboard
bullets: Open-source analytics dashboard with real-time charts, multi-tenant support, and OAuth authentication
500+ GitHub stars; adopted by 3 production teams within the first month of release
